message.content:
Our Leadership  
People Behind the Promise  

Mr. Anil Mhaske Managing Director  
Founder and visionary behind DCC's  
35+ year journey. Built a service-first company from the ground up into a company that  
India's biggest banks, government bodies, and enterprises trust with their IT.  


Mr. Sharad Mulmule  
Director – Operations  
With an inspiring 27-year trajectory at DCC  
rising from an entry-level professional to  
executive leadership through sheer integrity  
and dedication Mr. Mulmule is the driving  
force behind our operational stability. He  
ensures the seamless distribution of IT  
products, cultivates our robust dealer  
network, and dictates the flawless execution  
of our day-to-day internal operations.  


Mr. Jaysingh Jadhav  
Director – Sales & Marketing  
Bringing 25 years of strategic market  
expertise and an MBA from Pune University,  
Mr. Jadhav is the architect of DCC's sales  
pipeline and territory expansion. He is  
dedicated to accelerating revenue growth by  
forging collaborative partnerships and  
delivering innovative, customized IT  
distribution solutions to our B2B clientele.  


Mr. Sharad Londhe  
Director – Service  
Holding a BE in Electronics from Pune  
University and backed by 16 years at DCC,  
Mr. Londhe spearheads our multi-state  
service infrastructure. He commands a  
workforce of over 400 engineers and  
manages 3,000+ active AMC customers.  
Under his leadership, DCC efficiently caters to  
Banking, Private, and PSU sectors, driving our  
GeM business and overseeing authorized  
service centers for global brands like HP,  
ASUS, and ACER.  


Mr. Lahuraj Gaikwad  
Director – HR & Admin  
With 18 years of progressive leadership at  
DCC, Mr. Gaikwad is the cornerstone of our  
organizational culture. He oversees a  
dynamic workforce of 675+ employees,  
utilizing data-driven HR strategies to foster  
diversity, drive employee engagement, and  
maximize the workforce productivity that  
directly supports our client deliverables.  


Mr. Jeevan Kadam  
Director – Public Relations  
An integral part of DCC for 30 years, Mr.  
Kadam holds a Diploma in Digital  
Engineering, allowing him to masterfully  
bridge technology with corporate  
communication. An exceptional orator, he  
executes strategic PR campaigns and social  
service initiatives that continually enhance  
our brand reputation and visibility in the  
competitive IT sector.  


Mr. Aniruddha Mhaske  
Director – Business Development  
Representing the second generation of DCC  
leadership, Mr. Mhaske brings fresh, global  
operational experience from tenures at  
international giants including Walmart (US), Katek  
Inc. (Canada), and Skip (Netherlands). Holding a  
PG in Management with distinction from Canada,  
his ambitious mandate is to secure high-value  
AMC contracts within the PSU and Corporate  
sectors, spearheading DCC's vision to achieve a  
comprehensive PAN-India presence by 2030.  


Ready for an upgrade?  
Schedule a Free IT Infrastructure Health Check with our Corporate Solutions team.  
No commitment. No obligation. Just clarity on your IT risk and cost profile.
